name: Easy Marble Bark
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 6 squares of white chocolate in a heatproof bowl until smooth.
2. Melt 6 squares of dark (semisweet) chocolate in a separate heatproof bowl until smooth.
3. Stir half the melted nuts into each melted chocolate mixture.
4. Spoon alternating layers of the two chocolate mixtures onto parchment paper, creating a marbled pattern with a knife.
5. Let set at room temperature for about one hour, or refrigerate to speed up setting time.
6. Break into pieces once fully set.
